title: Shared Resources
purpose: This directory is where human users or agents can go for resources to accomplish the tasks they set out to do. There are always tools, skills, MCP connections, etc., that come with each user platform, but we also include our own libraries of both that are prewired to work with our system. In addition, there are knowledge packs, sub-agents, RSS feeds, and more.

contents.name: API_Provider_Info
contents.description: Downloaded copies of latest API provider documentation — Anthropic, Google, Deepseek, Ollama, OpenAI

contents.name: MCP_Connections
contents.description: Model Context Protocol connection templates and credentials

contents.name: Newsroom_v1.3
contents.description: Financial signal scanner — automated 3x daily, web-accessible reports via {PROJECT_NAME}5000.xyz

contents.name: Perception_Data
contents.description: Sensory data repository — door_watcher, faces, voices, health_data (auto-.gitignored)

contents.name: RSS_Feeds
contents.description: Custom RSS feed configurations powering the Newsroom intelligence pipeline

contents.name: Sensory_Ingestor
contents.description: ETL pipeline for converting media (PDF, video, imagery) into indexed knowledge graphs

contents.name: Specialties
contents.description: Long-term task-specific memory banks — AI Engineering, Linux

contents.name: Sub_Agents
contents.description: Curated sub-agent scripts and agentic patterns

contents.name: The_Library
contents.description: Knowledge graph archive — AI engineering, finance, philosophy, Linux, fiction, and more

contents.name: Tools
contents.description: Shared Python tool modules — universally accessible to any agent

contents.name: TV_OnThe_Radio
contents.description: Programs and services for NOOELEC USB digital radio scanner/receiver

contents.name: Web_Site
contents.description: Templates and active files for hosting a project-facing website
